content: Sir Netflix premium 1 month Rs 300 ka hai. Mobile, laptop aur TV sab pe chalega.
Ji bilkul sir, Malaysia me properly kaam karta hai. Aap kab start karna chahte hain?
Perfect sir! Payment Easypaisa pe karein: 03001234567 — Rs 300. Screenshot bhejein, 5 minute mein setup ho jayega!
Received sir, verify ho raha hai...
